review: Be alerted - you may pay the same as the luxiourios   Cinemark but don't be fooled, you are not getting the same quality accommodations by any means. Average seats, nothing more than most theaters.  Seriously disappointed - would've driven the extra 4 miles for comfort at the same price. Except there is a bar now but at assuredly at excessive pricing based on the occupancy and the high cost of movie tickets
